results.title: FAQs – American Eagle Europe
results.content:
### Returns & Refunds

If you’re not satisfied with your item(s), you can return them within 14 days of receiving your order. Once we receive the returned items and confirm they are in good condition, we will issue a full refund, including any applicable duties and taxes.

Conditions for a full refund:

 Items must be unworn/unused.
 Items must be returned in the original condition, packaging, and tags.
 Shoes must be returned in their original shoe box.

Non-returnable items (for hygiene/safety reasons):

 Underwear or swimwear if hygiene seal broken

To return an item(s):

1. Start a return request here. \For orders placed before May 19, 2026: please use this link.
2. Include your order ID in the return package. [...] © 2026 This site is operated by AEO Europe Retail Co. B.V, as authorized by American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. © and their respective licensors. All rights reserved. [...] Refunds are processed through your original payment method within 10 business days of receiving your return. It may take up to 2 weeks for your return to reach us.

Please note: Original shipping fees are not refundable. Once processed, a refund confirmation email will be sent to you.

### Orders

Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email with your tracking number. Please note that in some cases, it may take up to 5 working days for your order to be shipped. Rest assured, your order should still arrive within the delivery timeframe listed in our shipping table.

 Responsible Disclosure [...] In-store purchases cannot be returned online and must be returned in store.

Choose how to get your refund:

 Instant Credit in the form of an AEO e-gift card emailed to you as soon as you initiate the return – available to all Real Rewards members.
 If you’re shipping an online order back to us, please allow up to 2-4 weeks for us to receive your items and issue a refund. Your refund should be available in your account 5-7 business days after we issue it.
 Merchandise credit in the form of an AEO Merchandise return card

Start a Return

### FAQ

#### Is there a time limit on returns?

#### Are there any return exceptions?

#### Can I still return items if I lost my receipt/invoice? Does my email confirmation count as an invoice?

#### What if my items are damaged? [...] Choose how to get your refund:

 Exchange your item(s) for any item(s) of equal or lesser value. If you don't have proof of purchase, you can exchange your item(s) for a different size.
 A full refund to the original form of payment used for the purchase. Proof of purchase is required, such as a receipt, invoice, order history page, or order email.
 Merchandise credit in the form of an AEO Merchandise return card.

Find a Store

### Online Returns

If you received items by mail, it's easy to send them back! Use our online portal to print a shipping label or get a digital label to scan at USPS. Online returns are $5, or free for Real Rewards Level 3 Members and Credit Cardmembers, as well as for Aerie bras, bralettes, swimsuits, and third-party footwear.
